question_title: Will any Google Gemini model rank #1 on the LMSYS (LM Arena) leaderboard on March 15, 2026?
summary: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview is currently #3 on the Text Arena Overall leaderboard with a score of 1500±9, trailing the two Claude Opus 4.6 variants at 1503±7-8. The gap is small (3-4 points) and confidence intervals overlap, but Claude has more accumulated votes (6.5k-7.5k vs 4k) making its scores more stable. Monte Carlo simulation on the CI overlap gives ~18% probability that Gemini's true ability exceeds both Claude models. Adding a small probability (~2.4%) for a surprise new Google model release yields ~20% combined. No new Google text model releases are announced before March 15, and the current leader has held for ~4 weeks.

factors.description: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview currently #3 on Text Arena Overall, 3 points behind #1 Claude Opus 4.6 Thinking (1500 vs 1503)
Confidence intervals overlap significantly: Gemini ±9, Claude ±8. Monte Carlo shows ~18% probability Gemini's true score exceeds both Claude models
No announced new Google text model releases before March 15. Most recent release was Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview on Feb 19. Small chance (~8%) of surprise release
Claude Opus 4.6 has more accumulated votes (6.5k-7.5k) than Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview (4k), making Claude's score more stable and harder to displace
Arena.ai's own tweet characterizes Gemini as '4 pts from Opus 4.6', suggesting the gap may be slightly larger than the 3-point raw difference
Leaderboard position has changed hands recently (Gemini 3 Pro was #1 until Feb 6), showing positions can shift within weeks
13 days until resolution - limited time for significant score movement or new model deployment and vote accumulation

reasoning:
**Forecast: 20% probability (logit: -1.4)**

**Key reasoning:**

- **Current state**: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview sits at #3 on the Text Arena Overall leaderboard (1500±9), behind two Claude Opus 4.6 variants at #1 and #2 (1503±7-8). The gap is 3-4 points.

- **Statistical analysis**: The confidence intervals overlap significantly. A Monte Carlo simulation shows ~18% probability that Gemini's true ability exceeds both Claude models based on CI overlap alone.

- **No imminent catalyst**: No new Google text model releases are announced before March 15. Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview just launched Feb 19. There's a small (~2.4%) additional probability from a surprise release.

- **Stability advantage to Claude**: Claude has 6.5k-7.5k votes vs Gemini's 4k, making Claude's scores more stable and harder to displace through vote accumulation.

- **Limited time**: With only 13 days until resolution, there's limited runway for either significant score drift or deployment of a new model with sufficient votes to rank.
